text_original: memory of a brain dead goldfish is the best way to say it. it can't remember anything past 5 things you say in any rpg and your lucky if it can even remember the character names.
text_zh: 用“脑死亡金鱼的记忆力”来形容它是最贴切的。在任何RPG游戏中，它都记不住超过5句以上的对话，如果它还能记得角色名字，那算你运气好。
reply_original: That's a fair callout—forgetting character names mid-conversation is not how this should work. Could you screenshot the moment it forgets and send it to support@fantachat.ai? Our AI team will look into it directly. We know this breaks immersion and we take it seriously.
reply_zh:
我真的很抱歉 [角色名称] 忘记了重要的细节！我非常理解在 RPG 游戏中遇到“金鱼脑”是多么令人沮丧。

我们刚刚推出了全新的记忆服务升级，以改善长期记忆力。为了帮助我们解决这个问题，请将遗忘细节的截图发送至 support@fantachat.ai。我们的开发团队将尽快进行调查！
reply_original_before_override:
I am truly sorry [Character Name] forgot important details! I understand how frustrating a "goldfish memory" is for RPGs. 

We just launched a brand-new Memory Service upgrade to improve long-term retention. To help us fix this, please email screenshots of the forgotten details to support@fantachat.ai. Our dev team will investigate ASAP!
override_input: That's a fair callout—forgetting character names mid-conversation is not how this should work. Could you screenshot the moment it forgets and send it to support@fantachat.ai? Our AI team will look into it directly. We know this breaks immersion and we take it seriously.
